use_cases: Organizing content into distinct sections within a single view
Switching between different panels in a dashboard interface
Creating step-by-step wizards or process flows
Navigating between settings or configuration options
ai_summary: A navigation tabs component with primary (underline style) and secondary (pill style) variants. Supports disabled states, optional icons, and integrates with a tooltip component. Features minimalist flat design with hover state effects and click-based selection. Designed for organizing content sections in SaaS applications and general web interfaces.
